publishedAbstract: * This article explains as to how can we recreate the storage classes 'ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd' and 'ocs-storagecluster-cephfs' provided by OCS 4.
publishedTitle: How to recreate the storage classes 'ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd' and 'ocs-storagecluster-cephfs' provided by Red Hat OpenShift Container Storage 4.X?
